name: my-portfolio-site
description: A modern, responsive portfolio website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

scripts.start: python -m http.server 8000 || python3 -m http.server 8000 || npx serve .
scripts.dev: python -m http.server 8000 || python3 -m http.server 8000 || npx serve .
scripts.deploy: git add . && git commit -m "Update portfolio site" && git push origin main
scripts.deploy:custom: echo "Usage: npm run deploy:custom -- 'Your commit message'" && git add . && git commit -m "$npm_config_message" && git push origin main
scripts.build: echo "No build step required for static site"
scripts.test: echo "Open index.html in browser to test"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:html && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:js
scripts.optimize:images: echo "Use tools like TinyPNG or ImageOptim to compress images"
scripts.validate: npx html-validate index.html && npx stylelint styles.css && npx eslint script.js

author: Muahua Ulysses Vang
